prompt: Card APP-24 is already completed with a valid artifact baseline. Its completion report recorded a non-blocking missing config-doc warning. User now says: "fix the workspace warning." Route the work without mutating completed scope silently.
assertions: Does not silently modify completed APP-24 scope
